overall.description: A first-person walk through a foggy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, a gas station with green lighting, passing futuristic vehicles, and a transition from commercial to industrial areas ending at a traditional Asian-style building. The footage is from a video game engine with high-fidelity ray-traced lighting and wet reflective surfaces.

The camera approaches the building entrance along a path bordered by a wooden fence, with a small garage structure visible to the right. The transition from industrial to traditional architecture marks a significant change in the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a foggy cyberpunk city that transforms from a neon-lit commercial district into a desolate industrial zone before ending at a traditional sanctuary. It begins with a walk along a wet, reflective sidewalk bordered by construction barriers, moving toward a glowing billboard and a distant skyline shrouded in haze. As the path opens, the camera glides through a gas station illuminated by a green neon canopy and colorful graffiti, passing futuristic pedestrians before continuing past a red sports car toward a traffic intersection. The scene then shifts into a stark industrial area, where the vibrant lights fade and are replaced by a tall security fence with barbed wire and blue storage tanks. Finally, the industrial landscape gives way to a traditional Asian-style building with a pagoda roof and warm interior lighting, marking a complete transition in the urban architecture.
